PreToolUse.description: Enforce deny-patterns (always_on incl. OPERATOR.md only when AGENT_HOOK_PROFILE=strict), warn on template edits

PostToolUse.description: Persist dm_channel_id to config.json after channel reply

hooks.command: bash -c '[ -z "${HERMIT_DEV_MODE:-}" ] && exit 0; INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qF "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT" && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "scripts/|hooks/"; then python3 tests/run-contracts.py 2>&1 | tail -5; fi'

PostToolUse.description: Run contract tests after script/hook edits (dev mode only: set HERMIT_DEV_MODE=1)
Regenerate state-summary.md after state/ file edits

Stop.description: Stop pipeline: cost tracking, compact suggestion, session diff, evaluation, heartbeat
